# 🚀 AI-Powered Adaptive Admin Dashboard

An AI-powered platform that automatically generates admin dashboards by analyzing connected data sources, schemas, and system behavior.

---

## 🌟 Vision

To eliminate manual dashboard development by enabling:

> “Connect your system → Define once → Let AI build your dashboard”

---

## ⚡ Key Highlights

* 🔌 Plug-and-play connectors (API, DB, CMS)
* 🧠 AI-driven data understanding
* 📊 Auto-generated dashboards (charts, tables, KPIs)
* 🎛️ Customizable UI with override controls
* 🔐 Secure and scalable architecture

---

## 🧩 How It Works

1. Connect your data source
2. Define schema (or auto-detect)
3. Configure authentication
4. AI analyzes your data
5. Dashboard is generated instantly

## 🛠 Tech Stack

* Frontend: React.js
* Backend: Node.js (Express)
* Database: PostgreSQL / MongoDB
* AI Layer: OpenAI API

---

## 🚀 Status

🚧 Early Stage (MVP in progress)
